title: bidens cernua var. dentata
intro: Bidens cernua var. dentata, also known as Bur Marigold or Dented Bur Marigold, is a plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to North America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its use as a diuretic and anti-inflammatory agent, which can help alleviate symptoms of urinary tract issues and joint pain. The health benefits of Bidens cernua var. dentata include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and act as an antiseptic agent. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures from the leaves and flowers, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
